year.rationale: Provides temporal context for the research.

abstract.rationale: Offers a concise overview of the research focus and findings.

doi.rationale: Unique identifier for accessing the paper online.

venue.rationale: Indicates the forum where the research is published.

research_focus.description: Main research focus of the paper
research_focus.rationale: Clarifies the specific area of study within the broader field.

automatic_generation.description: Focus on automatic generation of reports
automatic_generation.rationale: Indicates the primary application of the research.

deep_learning.rationale: Highlights the methodology employed in the research.

methodology.rationale: Details the approaches taken to conduct the research.

architectures.description: List of deep learning architectures used
architectures.rationale: Specifies the frameworks applied in the report generation.

data_sets.description: Datasets used for training and evaluation
data_sets.rationale: Identifies the data sources that support the research.

experiments.rationale: Summarizes the experimental setup and findings.

evaluation_metrics.rationale: Describes the criteria for assessing the performance of models.

results.rationale: Presents the main findings from the experimental analysis.

performance.rationale: Summarizes the effectiveness of the proposed methods.

challenges.rationale: Highlights obstacles faced in the research process.

future_work.rationale: Provides insights into potential advancements in the field.

contributions.rationale: Summarizes the main innovations or findings presented.

availability.rationale: Indicates the accessibility of data used in the research.

data_availability.rationale: Clarifies whether the datasets are publicly accessible.

material_availability.rationale: Indicates if additional materials are available for review.
